title: Add test coverage for social/eic.py (editor-in-chief decision layer)
description: social/eic.py (412 lines) is the editorial decision layer that decides which topics become posts and what angle to take. It has no test coverage. Regressions here silently degrade content quality — wrong topic selection or skipped verdicts won't surface until the newsletter ships. Key logic around topic ranking, verdict parsing, and EIC gating should be tested.
requirements: tests/test_eic.py exists with at least 5 tests
Test verdict parsing from Claude response
Test behavior when Claude returns malformed verdict JSON
No real Claude API calls — mock run_claude_prompt or equivalent
done_criteria: Verdict parsing edge cases (missing fields, bad JSON) are exercised
context: social/eic.py is called during the SOCIAL phase. It reads candidate topics, calls Claude for editorial verdict, and decides the final post angle. Verdicts are JSON blobs saved to data/social-drafts/.
